name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset sums the offset window (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (100) and 2025 (200) season projected points, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. Projected points are additive (no range_offset_aggregate override), so the range reduces with SUM over the offset-expanded window (300), proving the correlated subquery re-scans the real table scoped to the right years and discriminators.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(scoring_format_player_projection_points.total) FROM scoring_format_player_projection_points WHERE scoring_format_player_projection_points.pid = player.pid AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.year IN (2024,2025) AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.scoring_format_id = 'draftkings' AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.week = '0') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_projection_points (pid, week, year, total, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', '0', 2024, 100.00, 'draftkings')
INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_projection_points (pid, week, year, total, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', '0', 2025, 200.00, 'draftkings')
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS season_projected_points_0 FROM scoring_format_player_projection_points WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND week = '0' AND scoring_format_id = 'draftkings'
